title: Crispy Greek Tomato Stir-fry
description: A fresh, crispy greek dish featuring dried chillies for a crowd-pleaser with a low-fat-friendly twist.
instructions: Heat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. Add olive oil and swirl to coat.
Add garlic and onion to the hot pan and sauté for about 1 minute until fragrant but not browned.
Add tomatoes along with their juice (if using canned), dried red chillies, and basil leaves. Stir frequently until the tomatoes are partially broken down and the mixture is heated through.
Reduce heat to low once the tomatoes have softened slightly and let cook for another 5 minutes allowing it to crisp up on the edges without burning.
